title: Venue Directions
subtitle: Follow these landmarks from the main entrance to reach the session conducting hall.

destination.name: Session Conducting Hall
destination.description: Main hall for Beauty of Cloud 2.0 workshops and sessions.

map.buildingName: New Faculty Building (English & Computing Training Center)

steps.instruction: Arrive at the university main entrance on Gangodawila Road. This is your starting point — look for the main gate signage and security post.
After entering, check in at the security desk or reception counter. Present your registration confirmation if asked.
Walk straight along the main internal road or paved walkway. Follow event signage pointing toward the Faculty of Applied Sciences / Computing area.
steps.tip: Volunteers in BOC shirts are usually stationed along this route.

steps.instruction: Enter the faculty building through the marked entrance. Use the stairs or lift as directed by on-site volunteers.
At the corridor junction, turn in the direction indicated by BOC direction boards (typically toward the seminar / lecture block).
You have arrived at the session conducting hall. Enter and take a seat — sessions start at the scheduled time shown in the event program.
steps.tip: This is your final destination for workshops and main sessions.
